Short CV

Tuğba KARAKUŞ TÜRKER graduated from Uludağ University, Department of Nursing in 2009. TÜRKER, who completed his postgraduate education at Istanbul University Child Health and Diseases Nursing Department between 2010-2018, continues his doctorate education in Istanbul University, Department of Pediatrics.
